summary: NotificationPort interface correctly extracted into domain/port/. PipelineWebhookNotifier implements NotificationPort. PipelineExecutor injects NotificationPort (not concrete adapter). Zero adapter imports in PipelineExecutor.kt confirmed. Tests updated to use mock NotificationPort.

VAL-FIX-004.evidence: PipelineExecutor imports only from domain/port/NotificationPort, no adapter imports found. NotificationPort interface in domain/port/ with notifyRunCompleted method. PipelineWebhookNotifier implements NotificationPort.

codeQuality.architecture: Correctly follows hexagonal architecture - domain depends only on port interfaces
codeQuality.testing: Tests in PipelineEndToEndIT and other test files reference NotificationPort properly
codeQuality.naming: NotificationPort follows existing port naming convention (LlmPort, SearchPort, etc.)
